style_authority.note: Uses the calm high-frequency operations context to preserve direct manipulation while rejecting spectacle and input lockout.

reference_selection.note: Applies motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, accessibility, performance, and runtime-validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Keeps only causal motion and removes delayed tracking, broad transitions, layout-property motion, and decorative scale feedback.

evidence_level.note: Labels source-verifiable defects separately from unverified lag, frame rate, browser arbitration, touch feel, and device behavior.

verified_boundary.note: Separates explicit source defects from runtime geometry, capture, event arbitration, Reduced Motion, and performance outcomes.

design_moves.note: Covers pointer capture, grab offset, local coordinates, presentation-value interruption, CSS px/s velocity, projection, bounds, snapping, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Remains motion-specific, read-only, decisive, and within the 150-line budget at 137 lines.
